pr_title: SDLC-23: Fix booking total increase when adding paid extras
pr_body:
## Summary
Fix the booking extras flow so adding paid extras to an existing booking increases the booking total instead of decreasing it.

## What changes
- Correct the price delta applied in `booking_service.py:add_extras`
- Keep the fix localized to the booking extras total-calculation path
- Add regression coverage for single and multiple paid extras

## Validation
- Add-extras service tests for one extra and multiple extras
- Booking pricing regression checks to ensure unrelated behavior is unchanged

## Notes
This change is scoped to the booking extras service path and avoids altering unrelated booking pricing logic.
reviewer_summary: Draft PR opened and awaiting human review.
